---
title: "Resume & Contact"
---

# Resume

You can view or download my resume here:

[Download My Resume (PDF)](my_resume.pdf)

<iframe src="my_resume.pdf" width="100%" height="600px">

</iframe>

## Contact

-   **Email:** [usantacruz05\@gmail.com](mailto:usantacruz05@gmail.com)
-   **GitHub:** [github.com/urielc1](https://github.com/urielc1)
-   **LinkedIn:** [linkedin.com/in/urielsc1](https://www.linkedin.com/in/urielsc1)

If you’d like to connect, collaborate, or learn more about my work, feel free to reach out through the platforms below.
